title: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
summary: The all-stock deal gives Fortitude a Nasdaq listing while HeartSciences retains its healthcare business and existing shareholders keep a minority stake.

title: CFTC chair says perp trading not suitable for all assets it regulates
summary: Michael Selig told US cotton producers that the agency’s regulatory approach to crypto perpetual futures may not be a “natural fit for traditional commodity markets, like agriculture.”

title: Trump Call for Crop Sales to Iran Adds Cautious Hope for Farmers
summary: President Donald Trump’s call for Iran to buy US crops as part of a peace deal is being met with a mix of doubt and cautious optimism by American farmers.

title: Ether-Linked Nonprofit Cuts Budget 40% During ‘Challenging Era’
summary: Vitalik Buterin, the programmer who helped create underlying technology for Ether, the world’s No. 2 cryptocurrency, said the nonprofit behind it is being forced to make some difficult decisions.

title: AI Agent Triggers Nuclear Strike After Getting Outmaneuvered in Civilization VI
summary: A new benchmark designed to test strategic reasoning found an AI-controlled empire spent 50 turns developing nuclear weapons to stop a rival's cultural victory—only to lose the game anyway.

title: New York man sentenced for $1.4 million crypto fraud scheme using bogus influencer accounts
summary: A New York man who posed as crypto influencers on Telegram and used false promises of staking rewards was sentenced to 15 months in prison.
